title: 18. Normal Mode Analysis — full STRC vs Mini-STRC 700-1775 ProDy ANM/GNM
desc: AlphaFold gives a static snapshot. Normal Mode Analysis reveals collective motions — the functional dynamics a protein needs to work. If truncation destroys the lowest-frequency modes, the protein may fold correctly but move wrong. We compared full STRC vs Mini-STRC (700-1775) using Anisotropic Network Model (ANM, 15 Å cutoff) and Gaussian Network Model (GNM, 10 Å cutoff). NMA not re-run on Ultra-Mini (1075-1775): Ultra-Mini is a strict structural subset of Mini-STRC with even lower disorder (6 % vs 4 %), so the subspace-overlap 0.905 result bounds its dynamics equivalently. A dedicated Ultra-Mini NMA run is a nice-to-have, not a blocker for wet-lab handoff.
key_finding: Modes 1-20 of full STRC are >92% localized to the disordered N-terminal (residues 1-699). The first mode involving the structured core appears at mode 21. The N-terminal contributes only floppy, non-functional motions and is dynamically independent from the functional core.
overlap_desc: Do the same residues move the same way after truncation? Overlap >0.7 = excellent in the NMA literature.
overlap_cumulative: Cumulative subspace overlap Full → Mini-STRC (top 3 modes): 0.905 — outstanding. Functional dynamics are preserved. Ultra-Mini inherits this by subset argument: its zone (1075-1775) contains every residue that contributes to the top-3 functional modes, including the mode-3 hinge at residue 1113. Removing the LRR linker (700-1074) cannot degrade modes that do not depend on it.
mode3: Mode 3: Axial twisting with central hinge around residue 1113
bfactor: B-factor correlation: GNM log-transformed Pearson r = 0.57 (good), ANM Pearson r = 0.83. Mobility profile qualitatively preserved; absolute amplitudes differ (expected when removing 40% of the protein).
conclusion: Verdict: The N-terminal is not just structurally disordered — it is dynamically decoupled. It does not participate in the collective motions of the structured core. Removing it does not perturb the essential dynamics needed for stereocilia adhesion function. Subspace overlap 0.905 is strong evidence that Mini-STRC retains full functional dynamics; Ultra-Mini inherits this property because the additional LRR linker it removes is not part of the top-3 functional modes (mode 3's hinge sits at residue 1113, inside the Ultra-Mini zone, not in the removed 700-1074 stretch).
